title: Dart CLI Debug Configuration
description: Configuration for debugging Dart CLI applications and tests using the official Dart SDK debug adapter

label.description: Human-readable label for this debug configuration

request.description: Whether to launch a new process or attach to an existing one

program.description: Path to the Dart file to run (relative to cwd)

cwd.description: Working directory for the debug session

args.description: Command-line arguments passed to the Dart program

env.description: Environment variables for the debug session

vmServiceUri.description: VM service URI for attach mode (e.g., ws://127.0.0.1:8181/abcd=/ws)

testMode.description: Run using the test debug adapter (dart debug_adapter --test)

dartSdkPath.description: Optional explicit path to the Dart SDK binary

stopOnEntry.description: Pause execution at the program entry point
